title: Date Night Olive Toast
description: A simple yet elegant evening snack featuring caramelized dates and creamy olive tapenade on toasted bread.
instructions: 2. Cut the dates in half lengthwise and place on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle the night with olive oil and toss with the dates to coat.
4. Roast the dates in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until caramelized.
5. Meanwhile, toast the bread until lightly browned.
6. Spread a layer of tapenade on each slice of toast.
7. Top each slice with a roasted date half and a few olives.
